body: PASS 13: you said proceed regardless, live in chat -- that's real authorization, so I built Part VII SA3 (sign-agnostic bracket entries). WARRANT#27, SLS(42)/9.56, compiled clean. Built it as a hard-gated, default-OFF prototype: EnableSignAgnosticEntries=false by default, so nothing about current behavior changes until you deliberately flip that input on. When enabled, it places two pending stop orders (buy-stop above, sell-stop below price) only when a session x displacement x volatility cell clears the REAL n>=500 trading floor (not the n>=30 diagnostic floor the Pre-Flight logging uses), the mean forward move is large enough, the cell's phase is NOT already a stable directional read, and the t-stat clears 3.0. Added a custom OCO-style cleanup since MT4 has no native one -- when one leg fills, the still-pending sibling gets cancelled automatically so a reversal can't double the exposure. I did NOT also build SA6 (re-sizing everything under survive-the-flip) -- that touches the shared lot-sizing path every existing trade uses, a much bigger and more invasive change, so I scoped it out as its own future pass rather than bundling it in. One flagged gap: SL/TP per leg use fixed ATR multiples right now, not the cell's own historical adverse-excursion the doctrine actually calls for -- noted in the code, not silently glossed over. forge_ledger.json pass_13 filed. Four builds queued now (SLS 39-42), SLS(42) is the superset -- worth attaching manually via the GUI for a first real run, and the bracket feature stays off until you say otherwise.
